source.title: How To Attack Bank Top Floor - Rainbow Six Siege
source.notes: Single-site walkthrough (CEO Office / Meeting Room only — same site as bank.json's 'ceo-meeting') built around a Thermite + Osa duo through the Kanto Wall window, plus a live stream-attack clip breakdown at the end. Auto-generated captions: 'Habana'/'Havana' = Hibana (ASR error, corrected throughout), 'Salma'/'salvo' = Hibana's X-KAIROS pellet throw, 'Oser'/'OS' = Osa. Player nicknames (Clyde, Dammo, 'pointy Viper') are the creator's teammates, not operator names, and are not used as operator identifiers below. Enemy defenders named in the clip recap (Doc, Army, Ella, Frost, Fenrir) are Defense-side and are referenced only as context for what the attackers were facing, never as Attack picks.

gadgetPlacements.location: West wall of CEO Office, underneath the default camera (right side from top Square, left side from inside)
gadgetPlacements.note: Open the left-hand side of the wall — a couple of strides in from the left, not all the way to the edge.

gadgetPlacements.location: East wall of Kanto Wall Corridor (top-right window from the Habana/Ace spawn side)
gadgetPlacements.note: Breach this wall. For Hibana, break the window glass first — it can make her X-KAIROS pellets land wrong.

gadgetPlacements.location: East wall of Kanto Wall Corridor, throw point
gadgetPlacements.note: Throw the X-KAIROS pellets roughly middle of the wall, slightly left of centre, a bit lower than instinct suggests.

gadgetPlacements.location: Osa shield #1 — West side of CEO Office, facing Janitor (near the repel window)
gadgetPlacements.note: Watch anyone swinging from Janitor or the head holes while Thermite is mid-breach.

gadgetPlacements.location: Osa shield #2 — plant cover, tucked against the cabinet/counter behind the breached West wall
gadgetPlacements.note: Place on a slight left angle once inside site; plant behind it.
Destroy the default camera in Square, then repel up and hold from this window all game if possible.

Shoot out both default cameras (site + Lobby) within the first ~30 seconds. Replace the Lobby camera, add a camera in the Square corner, a flank cam for Main Stairs, and a flank cam for Square Stairs.
Shoot out a panel and fire once for a quick peek. Never repeat the exact same panel twice.
Carry hard-breach charges as a backup in case Thermite dies before opening the Kanto/CEO wall.

gadgetPlacements.location: Repel windows on the East (Kanto Wall) side
gadgetPlacements.note: Claymore these windows (one is usually enough).

gadgetPlacements.location: EMP support on the East wall (Kanto/CEO wall)
gadgetPlacements.note: Bring EMPs for a Bandit/Kaid electrified wall. Thatcher charges bounce off and fail here — use EMP or a Twitch shock drone from Lobby.

gadgetPlacements.operator: Flex/lobby operator (Grim, Ying, Ash, Zofia, or Striker)
gadgetPlacements.note: Hold this area. Drone both corners of ATM before entering.
Drop a frag drone off the ceiling in front of Lobby and another in Trump. Get one inside the Elevator too.

operatorRecommendations.note: Opens the West CEO Office wall under the default camera. Enter from the Square repel window, not through top Square/head holes. Hold the angle from repel once open.
Repel in alongside or after Thermite. Shield facing Janitor, then a second shield to plant behind.
Clear default cams, set up flank cams on Main Stairs/Square Stairs/Lobby, hold the Square repel window.
Opens the Kanto Wall Corridor angle; runs claymores on the East-side repel windows.

operatorRecommendations.operator: Grim, Ying, Ash, Zofia, or Striker
operatorRecommendations.note: Denies ATM/Lobby windows, then pushes up Banana Stairs as the round opens up.

generalTips.note: Needs a minimum of 3 players: Thermite, Osa, someone controlling Lobby. Works with 3, better with 4, best with 5.
Being on repel is loud and visible — a sitting duck if spotted.
Elevator callouts: E1 = basement, E2 = middle floor, E3 = top floor.
Check prep phase for a Valkyrie/Pulse/C4 defender — watch for C4 from below and a defending team holding Lobby to deny the repel.
